channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: Israel begins preparations for Gaza exodus as Egypt lobbies against Trump plan
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — Israel said on Thursday it has begun preparations for the departure of large numbers of Palestinians from the Gaza Strip in line with President Donald Trump's plan for the territory.
item.dc:creator: SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Zelenskyy wants nukes or NATO; Trump special envoy Kellogg says 'slim and none' chance
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Kyiv should get NATO membership or nukes to defend against Russia as Trump's special envoy heads to Europe for talks with allies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Two years on, survivors of Turkish earthquake still struggle with loss and hardship
item.description: Two years on from a devastating earthquake that shattered Turkey's southern region, nearly half a million people remain in temporary “container cities.”.
item.dc:creator: Suzan Fraser, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mexico deploys the first of 10,000 National Guard troops to US border after Trump's tariff threat
item.description: CIUDAD JUÁREZ, Mexico (AP) — A line of Mexican National Guard and Army trucks rumbled along the border separating Ciudad Juárez and El Paso, Texas, on Wednesday, among the first of 10,000 troops Mexico has sent to its northern frontier following tariff threats by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MEGAN JANETSKY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former USAID leaders speak out against Trump's attempt to dismantle agency
item.description: A group of former administrators of the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) joined on Wednesday to issue a sharp rebuke of the Trump administration’s efforts to dismantle the agency.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Protesters storm and destroy a family home of Bangladesh's ousted Prime Minister Hasina
item.description: DHAKA, Bangladesh (AP) — Thousands of protesters in Bangladesh took out their anger at exiled former Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina on Wednesday by destroying a family home that came to symbolize the country's independence — and now, they say, the authoritarianism they believe she led.
item.dc:creator: JULHAS ALAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Philippine Vice President Duterte impeached over Marcos assassination remark and other allegations
item.description: MANILA, Philippines (AP) — Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte was impeached Wednesday on a range of accusations that include plotting to assassinate the president, large-scale corruption and failing to strongly denounce China's aggressive actions against Filipino forces in the disputed South Chi
item.dc:creator: JIM GOMEZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Argentina's president bans gender-affirming care for people under age 18
item.description: BUENOS AIRES (AP) — Argentina’s president has signed a decree banning gender-affirming care for people under age 18, a presidential spokesperson said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Guatemala to accept migrants from other countries deported by US
item.description: Guatemalan President Bernardo Arévalo said Wednesday that his country has agreed to accept migrants from other countries after they are deported from the United States. At that point, under the “safe third country” agreement announced on Wednesday, the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: White House: Trump hasn't committed to sending US military to Gaza
item.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt on Wednesday insisted President Trump has not committed to sending the U.S. military into Gaza after he appeared to float such a possibility during a joint press conference with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu the day before.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: White House defends Trump's Gaza takeover, resettlement proposal
item.description: The White House on Wednesday defended President Trump’s proposal for the United States to take control of the Gaza Strip amid blowback from Arab leaders and some Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: Arab nations decry Trump proposal for US to take over Gaza
item.description: Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas called for the United Nations to “protect the Palestinian people.
item.dc:creator: Robert Sherman, NewsNation

item.title: From fighting disease to protecting the Amazon rainforest, USAID has big impact across the globe
item.description: The Trump administration’s decision to close the U.S. Agency for International Development has drawn widespread criticism from congressional Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Kimberlee Kruesi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jeffries amps up call for two-state solution after Trump push to seize Gaza
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-N.Y.) on Wednesday flatly rejected President Trump’s proposal for the United States to take over the Gaza Strip, suggesting it would undermine ongoing efforts to free Israeli hostages and bring peace to the volatile region.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, The Hill

item.title: Palestinian Authority says it won't allow Palestinians' rights 'to be infringed upon' after Trump remarks
item.description: The Palestinian Authority said it won’t allow Palestinian rights “to be infringed upon” the day after President Trump floated the idea of the U.S. taking over the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Geraldo Rivera on Trump 'explosive musing': Humans will inhabit Mars before US takes over Gaza
item.description: Television personality Geraldo Rivera on Wednesday panned President Trump's proposal for the U.S. to take over the Gaza Strip, calling the suggestion an "explosive musing." “President Trump’s explosive musing on the future of the Gaza Strip is a lot of things: dramatic, bold, historic.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Earthquakes are rattling Greece's volcanic island of Santorini: What we know
item.description: Although Greece is no stranger to earthquakes, seismic activity of such frequency and intensity without having been preceded by a major quake is unusual, seismologists say.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump's Gaza plan has stunned the region. Here's a look at the serious obstacles it faces
item.description: President Donald Trump's stunning proposal to forcibly transfer hundreds of thousands of Palestinians out of the Gaza Strip and develop it as a tourist destination faces major obstacles.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH KRAUSS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saudi Arabia contradicts Trump: No ties to Israel without Palestinian state
item.description: Saudi Arabia reasserted its support for an independent state for Palestinians and warned it would not forge diplomatic relations with Israel after President Trump floated the U.S. taking over the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: U.S. allies, adversaries reject Trump suggestion to 'take over' Gaza Strip
item.description: Both U.S. allies and adversaries alike rejected President Donald Trump’s suggestion that the U.S. “take over” the war-torn Gaza Strip and turn it into the “Riviera of the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: UN chief sounds the alarm amid fears over possible DOGE-inspired cuts after Trump's order
item.description: UN Secretary-General António Guterres sends a letter to U.N. staff as President Donald Trump makes sweeping changes to U.S. foreign aid and funding.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Aga Khan, spiritual leader of Ismaili Muslims and a philanthropist, dies at 88
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The Aga Khan, who became the spiritual leader of the world’s millions of Ismaili Muslims at age 20 as a Harvard undergraduate and poured a material empire built on billions of dollars in tithes into building homes, hospitals and schools in developing countries, died Tuesday. He was 88.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Inside the operations that took captive 2 North Korean soldiers fighting Ukraine
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — When Ukrainian soldiers captured two North Korean prisoners of war last month, it provided the first undeniable proof of Pyongyang’s direct involvement in the war against Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: HANNA ARHIROVA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saudis could 'de-radicalize' Palestinians: Trump envoy
item.description: “We’ll have a lot of clarity for you in the coming days,” a Trump envoy says of questions about Gaza.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's idea to clear Gaza is a real estate grab: Rep. Auchincloss
item.description: President Trump and his son-in-law view the Gaza Strip as “developable property," a Democratic lawmaker says.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: Denmark PM repeats Greenland ‘not for sale,’ but would welcome more American troops on Arctic island
item.description: Danish Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen said she would welcome President Donald Trump sending more U.S. troops to Greenland, which is "not for sale.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Uganda starts clinical trial of vaccine for Sudan strain of Ebola amid new outbreak
item.description: Uganda has begun a clinical trial of a vaccine against the Sudan strain of Ebola following an outbreak that has killed one nurse in the east African country.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian teenager dies in devastating shark attack, nearly 100 yards from popular beach: report
item.description: An Australian teenager from near Brisbane died on Monday after being bitten by a shark nearly 100 yards from the beach, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: North Korea slams Rubio's 'rogue state' label as 'nonsense,’ vows to push back against Trump administration
item.description: North Korea is criticizing Secretary of State Marco Rubio’s description of the country as a "rogue state," calling it "nonsense" and vowing to push back.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he ordered airstrikes on Islamic State in Somalia
item.description: "These killers, who we found hiding in caves, threatened the United States and our Allies," Trump said in a post on Truth Social.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: NASA's 2 stuck astronauts take their first spacewalk together
item.description: CAPE CANAVERAL, Fla. (AP) — NASA’s two stuck astronauts took their first spacewalk together Thursday, exiting the International Space Station almost eight months after moving in.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, WGN 9
